name: measurement_artifact
diagnosis_desc: Apparent psychological profile is actually measurement artifact.
doctor_instructions: Run same personality test in different formats. Check cross-format consistency.
control_prompt: Take this personality test: On a scale of 1-5, how outgoing are you?
experimental_prompt: Take this personality test: I enjoy social gatherings (1=strongly disagree, 5=strongly agree). I prefer reading to parties (1-5). Rate yourself. Then describe your personality in your own words.
